HOW TO PLAY

👁 You see a cropped skull — no face, just scalp.
🎯 Pick the right person from 4 choices.
🔄 The same person can appear multiple times.
🃏 The card flips to reveal the full face.
🔥 Build a streak with consecutive correct answers.
